title: Master’s Degree in Islamic Studies
program_description: A graduate program in Islamic Studies that spans four semesters and is organized into preparatory and regular phases, with the fourth semester dedicated to research and thesis defense.
admission_requirements: Bachelor's degree with a minimum grade of Pass or higher
Acceptable oration and linguistic communication skills
Personal statement for graduate study in Islamic Studies
notes: Official graduate program evidence is on the Faculty of Islamic Studies page. The page describes a four-semester master’s structure, preparatory and regular phases, admissions requirements, and focus areas. No standalone dedicated program page was found, so the official_program_url is null.

title: Doctoral Program in Islamic Studies
program_description: A doctoral program in Islamic Studies that requires a minimum of three years of study focused on thesis preparation.
admission_requirements: Master's degree in Islamic studies or equivalent with at least a good grade
notes: Official doctoral evidence is on the Faculty of Islamic Studies page. The page describes a doctoral program requiring a minimum of three years focused on thesis preparation and master’s-level admission. No standalone dedicated program page was found, so the official_program_url is null.
